## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` is green (smoke + e2e print ALL PASS)
- [ ] Faithful on reasoning paths (no lossy summarizing of code/doc content)
- [ ] New/changed tool descriptions are tight (checked `npm run toolcost` if relevant)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] README tool-table row added/updated (if a tool changed)
